song.title: The Fairy's Waltz
song.keywords: drag queens, Bowery history, LGBTQ+ history, pre-Stonewall, gay ballrooms, fairies, painted eyes, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'The Fairy's Waltz' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: The Fairy's Waltz Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
og.description: 'History's no closet it's a ballroom / And I slipped inside' - Historical drag ballroom song from The Unseen Chorus.

twitter.title: The Fairy's Waltz Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus
twitter.description: 'Dancing boys in drag to death / We kissed in shadows while the city slept'

essay: "The Fairy's Waltz" is a historical vignette that transports the audience to pre-Stonewall gay ballrooms in New York's Bowery district. The term "fairy" was a common (often derogatory) slang for gay men and drag performers in the early-to-mid 20th century.

The song celebrates the underground gay culture that thrived despite legal persecution—drag balls, secret kisses, painted faces hiding true identities. It honors the resilience and joy found in these hidden spaces while acknowledging the danger ("Arrest us if you dare").
song.lyricsHtml:
They called them fairies in the Bowery
Painted lips sly hips a laugh too loud
A waltz for the outcasts the perverts the proud

Powdered cheeks and whiskey breath
Dancing boys in drag to death
Velvet curtains secrets kept
We kissed in shadows while the city slept

Spin me round in a fairy's waltz
Sin is sweet but it's not my fault
Men in skirts and men in ties
Hiding truth behind painted eyes
Whispered names in candlelight
Dancing free in the dead of night
Paint it on paint it on

A banker slips a coin at the door
His wedding ring shining as he wants more
A sailor's kiss still tastes of rum
He laughs too loud but I still succumb

Arrest us if you dare the law won't kill desire
Lock the stage but backstage still is fire

Spin me round in a fairy's waltz
Sin is sweet but it's not my fault
Men in skirts and men in ties
Hiding truth behind painted eyes
Whispered names in candlelight
Dancing free in the dead of night
Painted eyes painted eyes

History's no closet it's a ballroom
And I slipped inside
